summary: Addressed QA REQUEST_CHANGES by adding the missing client task dependency edges while keeping the M2 task graph in planning scope and leaving downstream implementation tasks in DRAFT.

tests_run.result: Existing modified coordination files remain: project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json. Untracked M2 task files, previous systems/QA handoffs, route files, and this revision handoff are present; no product code/package/app/content/docs files were modified by this revision.
M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 is REVIEW; all 11 downstream M2 tasks remain DRAFT; prior foundation/SIM/M1 tasks remain CLOSED.
No output while M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 remains in REVIEW.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON/DAG validation for all project/tasks/active/M2-*.json
tests_run.result: Parsed and shape-checked 12 M2 task files; DAG acyclic; dependencies known; requested client dependency edges present.

decisions: M2-CLIENT-MAP-001 now depends on both M2-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-001 and M2-ECON-POP-001 because its acceptance criteria require seasonal/economy/route inspection.
M2-CLIENT-DISTRICT-LIST-001 now depends on both M2-ECON-POP-001 and M2-ROUTE-TRANSPORT-001 because its acceptance criteria require district economy fields and route summary fields.
Acceptance criteria were not narrowed; the fix is dependency-order only.
M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 is set back to REVIEW and routes to qa_reviewer.
risks: Pre-existing coordination-state changes and route files remain in the worktree and were not modified by this revision.
The downstream client tasks remain R3 and still require independent review when implemented because they touch read models, UI pressure, and sim-core/client boundary assumptions.
requested_action: Re-review the revised M2 task graph dependency edges and accept or request further changes.
